# modbus-rs-wasm

> **Notice:** Please use the main [**`modbus-rs`**](https://www.npmjs.com/package/modbus-rs) package instead!
> 
> As of `v0.15.4`, `modbus-rs` includes built-in, unified support for both Node.js (native binaries) and Browser/WebAssembly environments automatically out of the box. You do not need to install `modbus-rs-wasm` directly.

## Installation

```bash
npm install modbus-rs
```

## Documentation

For full documentation, quick-start guides, and cross-platform usage examples (for both Node.js and Browser WASM), please refer to the [modbus-rs GitHub repository](https://github.com/Raghava-Ch/modbus-rs/tree/main/mbus-ffi/javascript#readme).
